title: Optimized Classic MC
description: Modpack designed for players who love the classic Minecraft experience but want improved performance, stability, and quality-of-life enhancements.
body:
# Optimized Classic MC
![Available On Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5f2bbe24d378d863f70c8b4bf7bf9c0ef2b56f7.png) ![Noavailable On Forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eac87b58331af401c559133e1438798e88a55d6.png)

Modpack designed for players who love the classic Minecraft experience but want improved performance, stability, and quality-of-life enhancements.

## What’s included in the modpack?
- Better Optimization – Includes performance-boosting mods that reduce lag, shorten loading times, and lower memory usage.
  
- Faithful to the Original – No drastic gameplay changes; the classic look and mechanics remain intact.
  
- Modern Fixes – Improved UI, better rendering quality, and smoother controls for a more enjoyable experience.
  
- Perfect for Nostalgic Adventures – Enjoy Minecraft the way you remember it, but with smoother gameplay and enhanced responsiveness.
